title: polyscias macrantha
intro: Polyscias macrantha, also known as the Polyscias or Variegated Polyscias, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polyscias macrantha include the treatment of fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Polyscias macrantha is typically prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
